content: SES/magic-link: new SES accounts sandboxed (200/day, verified recipients only) — production access request takes days and can be denied; apply early with concrete use case. Fresh domain needs SPF+DKIM+DMARC aligned before any sending or it warms up into spam. Biggest magic-link killer: corporate scanners/Outlook SafeLinks prefetch the link and consume single-use tokens (next-auth #4965/#1840) — fix with an interstitial confirm-button page so the GET is not the consuming action, or allow multiple uses within expiry.
